title: Tartaglia
content:

'''Tartaglia''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Tartaglia system/Legends|Tartaglia system]],<ref name="TEA" /> a part of the [[Hollan sector/Legends|Hollan sector]]<ref name="EGTW" /> in the [[New Territories/Legends|New Territories]] portion of<ref name="TEA" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. [[Hyperspace route/Legends|Hyperlanes]] linked it to the [[Asamin system/Legends|Asamin system]] in the [[Strabin sector/Legends|Strabin sector]], the [[Nicandra system/Legends|Nicandra system]] in the [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Nicandra sector/Legends|same name]], and the [[Vectinia system/Legends|Vectinia system]] of the [[Hewett sector/Legends|Hewett sector]].<ref name="EGTW" />

By the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]],<ref name="EtU">''[[Enter the Unknown]]''</ref> Tartaglia was the site of the [[Nova Vaults of Kakitai bel Toyouin]], which supposedly were buried under the planet's surface and were filled with unimaginable treasures. However, the vaults resisted all attempts at detection, and eventually millions of [[Treasure hunting/Legends|treasure hunters]] had perished on Tartaglia. Over time, the planet's crust began to crumble and came to feature many deep holes.<ref name="TEA" /> At one point between [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]] and [[13 ABY/Legends|13 ABY]], the [[Imperial Military/Legends|military]] forces of the [[Imperial Remnant]] [[Battle of Tartaglia|triumphed]] at Tartaglia over [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|those]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], inside the borders of which the world was situated at the time.<ref name="EGTW" />

==Behind the scenes==
The planet Tartaglia was introduced in the [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' by [[Daniel Wallace]] and [[Jason Fry]],<ref name="TEA" /> who built upon the mention of the [[Fusion Clouds of Tartaglia]] featured in [[Ben Burtt]]'s [[2001]] book [[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']].<ref name="Phrase Book">[[Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide (real-life book)|''Galactic Phrase Book & Travel Guide'']]</ref> Wallace further noted that he had developed the planet's Nova Vaults of Kakitai bel Toyouin,<ref name="Blog">{{Blogspot|subdomain=geekosity|url=2009/08/endnotes-for-star-wars-essential-atlas_28.html|name=Daniel Wallace's Geekosity|text=Endnotes for Star Wars: The Essential Atlas (part 4 of 5)}}</ref> as well as the description of the world as featuring deep holes,<ref name="TEA" /> as an homage to the [[Wikipedia:Oak Island mystery|Money Pit of Oak Island]], which had fascinated him during his childhood.<ref name="Blog" /> ''The Essential Atlas'' placed Tartaglia in grid square M-7.<ref name="TEA" />
